About Me

Creative direction for premium product visuals and modern brand campaigns.

Osama Alshamery

I specialize in AI-generated commercial advertising, creating premium product advertisements, luxury product visuals, sports campaigns, fashion visuals, and cinematic marketing posters.

My workflow combines advanced AI image generation, prompt engineering, Photoshop refinement, product visualization, lighting direction, and brand-focused advertising composition.

Professional Experience

I started professional work in late 2023 and I am still actively working with Sport Land Center, Sport City Center, and Hubaishi Sport.

I also studied AI commercial design under Rafael Franco Academy, developing a premium workflow focused on high-end advertising visuals, sports brands, fashion products, retail products, and social media campaigns.
